<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\TextUI\XmlConfiguration\CodeCoverage\Report; use PHPUnit\TextUI\Configuration\File; /** * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit * * @internal This class is not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit * * @immutable */ final readonly class Crap4j { private File $target; private int $threshold; public function __construct(File $target, int $threshold) { $this->target = $target; $this->threshold = $threshold; } public function target(): File { return $this->target; } public function threshold(): int { return $this->threshold; } }
